case_title: JEFFREY, ROBERT L. JR. VS UNION BANK OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JEFFREY, ROBERT L. JR. AS TO DEFENDANT UNION BANK OF CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
